filename: Business Continuity Exercise - Results and Action Plan.docx
summary: This document records the outcomes of a business continuity exercise simulating a cloud outage for KeepMeCompany's AI patient intake system. It lists three resolved issues, including the implementation of a multi-cloud strategy with AWS and updated emergency communication protocols. The report confirms all action items were completed by mid-September 2024 to ensure service reliability and patient data security.
